seoTitle: Tarrengower vs Tarrington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tarrengower and Tarrington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tarrengower and Tarrington.
heading: Tarrengower vs Tarrington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tarrengower, Victoria and Tarrington, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarrington has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Tarrengower (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tarrengower or Tarrington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tarrengower has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Tarrington scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tarrengower scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Tarrington scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tarrengower or Tarrington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarrington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
